creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #2)
> Feedback timeout. Close here. If there are still problems, please, reopen.

When you close x11 PRs with feedback timeout, please keep them assigned to x11@.  That way I can see that they are closed, and they show up if I look for closed prs to x11.

Thank you for your help with cleaning out old PRs!

Regards
Niclas
